_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 3 confidence tiers (high/medium/low) used in harmful_additives.confidence and backed_clinical_studies.effect_direction_confidence. UI-bound vocab — carries DISPLAY CONTRACT.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for confidence-tier presentation. Used in harmful_additives + clinical_studies cards.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline sources: scripts/data/harmful_additives.json `confidence` field (124 entries; live: high=61, medium=54, low=9), scripts/data/backed_clinical_studies.json `effect_direction_confidence` field (197 entries; live: medium=124, high=67, low=6).

confidence_tiers.name: High confidence
confidence_tiers.notes: Multiple high-quality sources agree. Evidence is consistent and the underlying methodology is robust.

confidence_tiers.name: Medium confidence
confidence_tiers.notes: Reasonable evidence but with notable caveats — limited sample sizes, single-source reliance, or methodological gaps.

confidence_tiers.name: Low confidence
confidence_tiers.notes: Limited or low-quality evidence. Treat the signal as preliminary; expect further updates.
